steps.title: Compare the time frames
steps.content: The first sentence describes Vietnam's urbanization from 2015 to 2020. The second sentence describes urbanization across Southeast Asia during that same five-year period, so the transition must signal simultaneous trends.

steps.title: Reject the wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A would make the regional trend an example of Vietnam's trend, which it is not. Choice B implies a later event, but both trends occurred during the same period. Choice C signals restatement, but the second statistic is distinct.

steps.title: Mark simultaneous change
steps.content: The remaining transition means the two urbanization trends happened at the same time, matching the overlapping dates. The answer is D.
